property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise all personalities to their full power stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Wild Card

property.name: Text
property.value: If at the end of the Gohan Season you have collected all the Gohan League Cards except for 1, you may use this card to complete this season.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League only. Show your opponent your hand. If all of the cards in your hand are Energy Combat cards, raise your anger 3 levels. This must be the first card you play in Combat. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League only. For the remainder of the game, any physical attacks for the Saiyan Saga do +3 power stages of damage. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If performed by Garlic Jr., and the damage from this attack defeats your opponent, your opponent is overkilled.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League only. For the remainder of the game, any energy attacks from the Frieza Saga do +3 life cards of damage. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League only. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If successful, and there is a Battleground in play, discard the Battleground and return this card to your hand instead of discarding it. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Use after you discard or remove an Ally from play. All of your opponent's Allies lose 4 power stages to a minimum of 0. Your opponent's Main Personality loses 3 power stages. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Gohan only. Defense Shield: Stops the first unstopped attack performed against Gohan during Combat.

card.name: I'm a Popo in a Bottle...

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: League only. Attach this card to an Ally in play. Until this card is now longer attached to this Ally, he cannot take control of Combat, and cannot have damage redirected to him. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: You Win!

property.name: Text
property.value: Send this card along with the League Redemption Form, to Score, to receive the prize of your choice.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your deck for Vegeta, Trunks, Gohan, Piccolo, Krillin, Tien or Yamcha and place him into play at 3 power stages above 0, regardless of the current level of your Main Personality.

property.name: Type
property.value: Wild Card

property.name: Text
property.value: If at the end of the Krillin Season you have collected all the Krillin League Cards except for 1, you may use this card to complete this season.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: League only. Any Allies in play this Combat that were discarded and/or removed from the game are place into play at 3 power stages above 0. Use at the end of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Krillin only. Physical attack doing +3 life cards of damage. You may remove 15 cards with even card numbers in your discard pile from the game. If successful and you removed the 15 cards from your discard pile, your opponent must pass in his next 3 "Attacker Attacks" phases this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Physial attack doing +2 power stages of damage. The first time you perform this attack, you may remove any amount of Krillin Named cards in your discard pile from the game. For every 4 Krillin Named cards removed, this attack stays on the table to be used 1 more time this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: League only. Use when entering Combat. All players set their Main Personalities at their highest power stage and draw 5 cards. Your opponent's Main Personality may pay 3 power stages when you use this card to stop its effects.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League only. For the remainder of Combat, whenever you play a card from your hand, place the bottom 2 cards of your discard pile on the bottom of your Life Deck to have your Main Personality gain 2 power stages. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: If your opponent does not perform an attack during his next "Attacker Attacks" phase, he must play with his hand face up on the table until the beginning of his next turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League only. Use at the beginning of your opponent's Power Up Step. Your opponent cannot skip the Combat Step of this turn, even if another card effect would make them skip Combat or if they played a battleground or location. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League only. For the remainder of Combat, whenever one of your successful physical attacks does less than 5 power stages of damage, your opponent discards the top card of his Life Deck and cannot perform an attack during his next "Attacker Attacks" phase.

property.name: Type
property.value: You Win!

property.name: Text
property.value: Send this card along with the League Redemption Form, to Score, to receive the prize of your choice.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 10 Life Cards and costing 4 power stages to be paid by an ally instead of your main personality.

property.name: Type
property.value: Wild Card

property.name: Text
property.value: If at the end of the Yamcha Season you have collected all the Yamcha League Cards except for 1, you may use this card to complete this season.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Tuff Enuff only. Use as a Defense. Prevent all but 2 life cards of damage dealt to you by the attack just performed against you. Remove from the game after use.

card.name: Super Arm Cannon of Super Stuff!

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Tuff Enuff only. Energy attack doing 12 life cards of damage. Costs 7 power stages to perform. When you perform this attack, you may discard any of your Non-Combat cards in play to reduce the cost of this attack by 2 power stages for each Non-Combat card you discard for this effect.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Tuff Enuff only. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage for every 4 power stages this personality is above 0. Raise your anger 1 level. If damage from this attack is redirected to an Ally, the power stages of damage become life cards of damage instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Tuff Enuff only. When a physical attack you perform becomes successful, place a card in your discard pile under this Drill face down. When entering Combat and there are at least 4 cards under this Drill, you may discard the cards under this Drill to have all of your physical attacks do +4 power stages of damage for that Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Tuff Enuff only. If you have 2 of the same card in your hand that can perform an energy attack, reveal both of them to your opponent and attach this card to your Main Personality. While this card is attached, you do not have to pay costs for any energy attacks your Main Personality performs.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Yamcha only. Focused physical attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If successful, your opponent skips his next "Attacker Attacks" phase and the next energy attack you perform this Combat is a focused attack. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Tuff Enuff only. Use during your Non-Combat Step. At the end of the turn, you may search your Life Deck for any 2 Allies and place them into play at 4 power stages above 0 if you skipped the Combat Step of this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Tuff Enuff only. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Set all players' anger levels to 0. Drills may not be used for the remainder of Combat. Damage from this attack cannot be prevented.

property.name: Type
property.value: You Win!

property.name: Text
property.value: Send this card along with the League Redemption Form, to Score, to receive the prize of your choice.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If successful, shuffle any or all of your Goku Named cards that have been removed from the game into your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Wild Card

property.name: Text
property.value: If at the end of the Goku Season you have collected all the Goku League Cards except for 1, you may use this card to complete this season.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Tuff Enuff only. Use when one of your energy attacks becomes successful. Raise the attacking personality to his highest power stage. Place the top 2 cards of your discard pile on the bottom of your Life Deck. Draw a card. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Tuff Enuff only. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. For the remainder of Combat, any player may discard a card from his hand to perform a physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage or an energy attack costing 2 power stages to perform.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League, Tuff Enuff, and Goku only. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If you have used "Goku's Farewell" this game, lower your anger 2 levels (this overrides the first effect of "Goku's Farewell"). If Chi-Chi is in play, this is a focused attack. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Tuff Enuff only. Use at the beginning of your Discard Step if you skipped Combat. Raise your Main Personality to his highest power stage. Raise your anger 2 levels. Place the bottom 2 cards of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Tuff Enuff only. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. If your opponent passed in his last "Attacker Attacks" phase and you have a successful attack in your last "Attacker Attacks" phase, your opponent loses 4 power stages and this attack does an additional +4 power stages of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Goku only. Attach to your Chi-Chi. While attached, you may draw the bottom card of your discard pile when entering Combat. Chi-Chi may have only 1 "Wedding" attached.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: League and Tuff Enuff only. Your opponent chooses "even" or "odd". Discard the top card of your Life Deck and look at the card number. If your opponent guessed correct, raise your Main Personality to his highest power stage, place the bottom 5 cards of your discard pile on the bottom of your Life Deck and shuffle this card into your Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Leauge and Tuff Enuff only. Your opponent discards the top 2 cards of his Life Deck. Shuffle your Life Deck after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: You Win!

property.name: Text
property.value: Send this card along with the League Redemption Form, to Score, to receive the prize of your choice.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Place the bottom 3 cards of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck. For the remainder of Combat, when your opponent passes he must discard a card from his hand. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Wild Card

property.name: Text
property.value: If at the end of the Majin Buu Season you have collected all the Majin Buu League Cards except for 1, you may use this card to complete this season.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Shuffle up to 4 cards in your discard pile into your Life Deck. If used by Majin Buu, gain 6 power stages. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If successful, raise any personality to his highest power stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin Buu and Tuff Enuff only. For the remainder of Combat, any attacks performed with your Majin Buu's personality power are focused attacks that do an additional +3 power stages of damage. You may discard any cards attached to your Majin Buu.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Energy attack. You may discard any cards attached to the personality performing this attack. For each card you discard in this way, this attack does an additional +2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: For the rest of combat, you may remove 3 cards in your discard pile from the game during your attack phase to play an Ally of any level from your discard pile into play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 3. Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. You may search your Life Deck for a copy of "Hideous Intent" and place it into your hand. If successful, discard one of your opponent's Non-Combat cards in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (You are allowed to have multiple copies of Piccolo in play with this card effect.) Tuff Enuff only. Search your Life Deck for up to 3 Piccolo personality cards and place them into play as Allies at 5 power stages above 0. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Physical attack doing +6 power stages of damage. If successful, your opponent shuffles his hand into his Life Deck and draws 2 cards. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: You Win!

property.name: Text
property.value: Send this card along with the League Redemption Form, to Score, to receive the prize of your choice.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card discarded from your life deck at the end of the turn you may search your life deck for a level 1 ally and place him into play.) Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels and raise your anger 1 level. If you have Goku in play as an Ally, this is a focused attack and does an additional +4 life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Wild Card

property.name: Text
property.value: If at the end of the Vegeta Season you have collected all the Vegeta League Cards except for 1, you may use this card to complete this season.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If successful, remove your opponent's discard pile from the game and raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Stops a physical attack. Gain 6 power stages. If used by a Saiyan Heritage personality, you may discard a card from your hand to discard up to 2 of your opponent's Non-Combat cards in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Vegeta and Tuff Enuff only. Endurance 2. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Empower 3. If successful, you may search your Life Deck for 1 copy of either "Vegeta's Quickness Drill," "Majin Vegeta's Rage," or "Vegeta's Fury" and place it into play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Attach this card to one of your opponent's Allies in play. While attached, at the beginning of your opponent's "Defender Defends" phase you may choose for the attached Ally to take control of Combat for your opponent until the next "Fight Back" phase, even if his Main Personality is at 2 power stages above 0 or higher.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Tuff Enuff only. Endurance 2. End Combat. During the Discard Step of this turn, you may keep 1 additional card in your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Look at your opponent's hand. If successful and used by Vegeta or Majin Vegeta, raise your anger 3 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: (You may use this card when entering Combat.) Tuff Enuff only. Place the top 3 cards of your discard pile on top of your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: (Use at the end of your turn.) Tuff Enuff only. Play the top 2 Non-Combat cards in your discard pile that are not limit 1 per deck or named "Scientific Repatching". Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: You Win!

property.name: Text
property.value: Send this card along with the League Redemption Form, to Score, to receive the prize of your choice.
